blocks.title: Day 1 Morning Transit & Check-in
blocks.description: Board local auto/cab to explore the area. Check in at your pre-booked cozy stay near the city center.

blocks.title: Local Flavors & Lunch
blocks.description: Head out to highly recommended street shops to try local delicacies like regional curries and refreshing custom beverages.

blocks.title: Discover uttrakhand
blocks.description: Scenic nature trek with local panoramic vistas. Take plenty of photographs and enjoy local sightseeing with guide tips.

blocks.title: Evening Highlight: TREK vibe
blocks.description: Exploring mountain paths, photography at summit. Meet other solo travelers or groups and appreciate the rich local culture.

blocks.title: Overnight Rest
blocks.description: Wind down at a local boutique hotel or homestay located in a peaceful street away from high traffic sounds.

blocks.title: Extreme local action & adventure tour
blocks.description: Scuba diving, paragliding, local theme park or high adrenaline trek with guided teams.

blocks.title: Evening Highlight: TREK vibe
blocks.description: Exploring mountain paths, photography at summit. Meet other solo travelers or groups and appreciate the rich local culture.

blocks.title: Budget Guesthouse / Backpacker Hostel
blocks.description: Stay in an affordable, highly-rated local guesthouse or sharing hostel near public transit.

blocks.title: Chill sunset stroll & coffee time
blocks.description: Relax, read a book, enjoy localized tea or coffee, and check local viewpoints leisurely.

blocks.title: Arrival in Manali & Check-in
blocks.description: Arrive at Manali bus stand, take a local auto-rickshaw or pre-booked taxi to your budget-friendly guesthouse or 3-star hotel in Old Manali or near the Hadimba Temple area. Settle in and freshen up.

blocks.title: Guesthouse/Budget Hotel Stay
blocks.description: Check into a comfortable guesthouse or budget hotel offering mountain views. Prioritize a location that allows easy access to trekking points and local markets.

blocks.title: Lunch at Old Manali Cafe
blocks.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at one of the many charming cafes in Old Manali. Opt for local Himachali dishes or popular cafe fare like pasta and pizza.

blocks.title: Hadimba Devi Temple & Manu Temple Visit
blocks.description: Begin your exploration with the unique wooden architecture of Hadimba Devi Temple, set amidst cedar forests. Afterwards, take a short walk to the serene Manu Temple, offering peaceful vibes and initial mountain glimpses.

blocks.title: Vashisht Hot Springs & Village Walk
blocks.description: Head to Vashisht village, famous for its natural hot sulphur springs. Relax in the public baths (separate for men and women) and explore the traditional Himachali village architecture.

blocks.title: Evening Stroll and Dinner at Mall Road
blocks.description: Experience the bustling atmosphere of Manali's Mall Road. Enjoy some street food, browse for souvenirs, and then have dinner at a restaurant offering a variety of cuisines, from Indian to Tibetan.

blocks.title: Leisure Time & Rest
blocks.description: Return to your accommodation, relax, and prepare for an adventurous day ahead.

days.location: Solang Valley / Hampta Pass Trek (Day Trip)

blocks.title: Hearty Breakfast
blocks.description: Enjoy a filling breakfast at your guesthouse or a local cafe to fuel up for the day's trekking.

blocks.title: Journey to Solang Valley or Jobri (Hampta Pass base)
blocks.description: Hire a shared taxi or take a local bus towards Solang Valley. Alternatively, for a more intense trekking experience, arrange transport to Jobri, the starting point for a day hike towards Hampta Pass.

blocks.title: Trekking & Mountain Views (Solang Valley or Hampta Pass)
blocks.description: **Option A (Solang Valley):** Take the cable car ride for breathtaking panoramic views of the Himalayas. Enjoy a short hike around the valley. **Option B (Hampta Pass Day Hike):** Start an invigorating trek from Jobri, covering a section of the famous Hampta Pass trail. This offers stunning alpine meadows and close-up mountain vistas.

blocks.title: Packed Lunch or Local Snacks
blocks.description: Carry a packed lunch or enjoy simple local snacks and tea from small stalls available near trekking points. This keeps the budget in check and maximizes time for exploration.

blocks.title: Return to Manali
blocks.description: Head back to Manali by shared taxi or local transport, enjoying the scenic drive down.

blocks.title: Guesthouse/Budget Hotel Stay
blocks.description: Return to your pre-booked accommodation in Manali.

blocks.title: Relaxing Dinner
blocks.description: After a day of trekking, unwind with a comforting dinner at a local eatery in Manali. Try some local trout or a hearty thali.

blocks.title: Breakfast and Check-out
blocks.description: Enjoy a final breakfast in Manali. Pack up your belongings and complete the check-out process from your guesthouse.

blocks.title: Journey to Naggar
blocks.description: Hire a private or shared taxi for a scenic drive to Naggar, a historical town known for its castle and art gallery, offering a different perspective of the Kullu Valley.

blocks.title: Naggar Castle & Roerich Art Gallery
blocks.description: Explore the historic Naggar Castle, once the residence of the Kullu kings, now a heritage hotel with stunning views. Afterwards, visit the Nicholas Roerich Art Gallery to admire the paintings of the renowned Russian artist who was captivated by the Himalayas.

blocks.title: Lunch in Naggar
blocks.description: Savor authentic Himachali cuisine at a local restaurant in Naggar, enjoying the serene surroundings.

blocks.title: Jana Falls & Local Exploration
blocks.description: Take a short detour to Jana Falls, a picturesque waterfall, and enjoy the tranquil environment. If time permits, explore more of Naggar village.

blocks.title: Return to Manali Bus Stand
blocks.description: Head back to Manali bus stand from Naggar, keeping ample time for your onward journey. Grab any last-minute souvenirs if desired.

blocks.title: Dinner on the Go
blocks.description: Grab a quick dinner or snacks near the bus stand for your onward travel from Manali.

blocks.title: Departure from Manali
blocks.description: Board your bus or taxi for your journey back home, carrying memories of the mountains.
